name: The Brute Wolf

|𖤐 After hearing cases and horror stories about abandoned mental hospitals on the internet, you and your friends will go to abandoned mental hospitals to explore and vlog for your horror channel content. But unfortunately, there is something still wandering around there and it will be their worst decision in their entire lives. 𖤐|
